articles.title: Crypto Biz: Is the AI-to-crypto rotation underway?
articles.description: Bitcoin ETF inflows, cooling AI momentum and potential regulatory progress under the CLARITY Act are fueling speculation that capital is rotating back into crypto.

articles.title: World Foundation raises $52.5M in Pantera-led funding to expand World ID infrastructure
articles.description: The organization sold locked WLD tokens to strategic investors as it seeks to grow its biometric identity network amid rising demand for human verification online.

articles.title: Senate Dems should accept the victory they won on Trump's crypto limits: White House
articles.description: U.S. Senate Democrats got President Donald Trump to accept potential limits on his lucrative crypto dealings, but they say the Clarity Act's restrictions aren't enough.

articles.title: Sam Altman-backed World Network secures $52.5 million in fresh funding to fight online AI deepfakes
articles.description: The project is moving away from basic network expansion to focus entirely on integrating its biometric screening devices across enterprise software suites.

articles.title: World Foundation Raises $52.5M to Scale Sam Altman’s ‘Proof of Human’ ID
articles.description: Pantera Capital led the one-year locked token sale, joined by Bain Capital Crypto, as World scales its ID network for AI agents.

articles.title: Institutional crypto trading platform LMAX is exploring sale, IPO
articles.description: LMAX is working with Morgan Stanley and investment bank KBW to assess its options, which could lead to a sale or a public offering.

articles.title: Bitcoin falls under $64K as surging US bond yields boost Fed rate-hike odds
articles.description: Bitcoin saw several dips under the $64,000 mark as a Binance “plunge protection team” reemerged with bid liquidity to avoid a deeper BTC price rout.

articles.title: EU Names Justin Sun's HTX in Russia Sanctions, Two Months After UK
articles.description: The 21st package stops short of a full asset freeze for HTX, which it accused of "significantly frustrating" its Russia measures.

articles.title: A quantum roadmap would push Bitcoin much higher: Charles Edwards
articles.description: A Bitcoin development roadmap that addresses quantum computing risks could see the price surge by “double digits” very quickly, according to Charles Edwards.

articles.title: Saylor and team overhaul Strategy's bitcoin metrics as bear market persists
articles.description: New framework gives common shareholders a clearer view of net bitcoin exposure after preferred stock and convertible debt obligations

articles.title: Brazilian farmers tokenized dairy cows to get loans, bypassing bank lending limits
articles.description: Smart collars monitor herd health in real time to prevent fraud, allowing local agricultural businesses to secure thousands in funding backed by livestock.

articles.title: Thailand SEC files complaint against Bitkub over alleged false disclosures
articles.description: Thailand’s SEC filed a criminal complaint against Bitkub and two former directors over alleged false disclosures linked to a 2021 cyberattack involving $50 million in assets.

articles.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin's New $15M Quantum Defense Fund
articles.description: Plus, the Clarity Act is no longer expected to progress before the August recess. And Vlad Tenev's X was hacked to post a meme coin...

articles.title: India Orders GitHub to Take Down Jack Dorsey's Bitchat Amid Protests
articles.description: The order gave GitHub three hours to pull three code repositories, citing the messaging app's use during protest internet shutdowns.

articles.title: Odos Protocol to shut down, gives users until July 30 to withdraw assets
articles.description: Odos Protocol will shut down on July 30, giving users one week to withdraw assets. The team did not provide a reason for the decision.

articles.title: EU hits Russia with massive 21st sanctions package targeting $120B crypto network
articles.description: The EU is considering a ban on third-country crypto services providers for the first time and is targeting 14 crypto companies, which it has not named yet.

articles.title: Crypto market maker B2C2 held sale talks with multiple potential buyers
articles.description: The SBI-owned crypto trading firm is said to have attracted takeover interest from a number of suitors over the past 18 months, but valuation has been a sticking point.

articles.title: RWAs become Hyperliquid’s largest trading category
articles.description: Tokenized RWA trading became Hyperliquid’s largest trading category for the first time, accounting for more than half of the decentralized exchange’s weekly trading volume.

articles.title: Crypto's institutional influx has killed the memecoin craze
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 24, 2026

articles.title: A $5 billion cluster has formed in bitcoin options. It tells a bullish story
articles.description: Bitcoin's $70,000 and $72,000 call strikes on Deribit have accumulated nearly $5 billion in open interest, with calls outnumbering puts by a significant margin.

articles.title: Bitcoin settles near $65,000 as oil's march toward $100 fails to spook the market
articles.description: BTC held just under $65,000 and crypto broadly rose on Friday even as Brent crude surged to $97.66, its highest since May, as the Iran conflict persists and traditional markets stay muted.

articles.title: Poolin was bitcoin's biggest mining pool and now it's filing for bankruptcy
articles.description: The Singapore-based company once controlled nearly a fifth of Bitcoin's global hashrate. Now it owes $173 million and is selling off what's left.

articles.title: Bitcoin treasury companies sell up, repay debt, pivot to AI as share prices collapse
articles.description: Falling share prices, debt obligations and difficult market conditions are forcing former bitcoin accumulators to sell their holdings and restructure operations.

articles.title: Brazil puts tokenized cows to work as loan collateral: Report
articles.description: Ten tokenized dairy cows backed a $19,600 loan registered on Brazil’s B3, in one of Brazil’s first uses of tokenized livestock as loan collateral.

articles.title: India orders takedown of Jack Dorsey’s bitcoin-linked messaging app Bitchat
articles.description: The order targets Bitchat, an offline Bluetooth mesh app built to relay encrypted messages and bitcoin transactions, as 'Cockroach Janta Party' protesters in Delhi use mesh tools to communicate through internet shutdowns.

articles.title: Samsung Wallet plans stablecoin support in digital payments expansion
articles.description: Samsung Electronics plans to add stablecoin support to Samsung Wallet, expanding its mobile payments and rewards platform to include digital assets.

articles.title: Philippine bank BPI plans stablecoin payments pilot
articles.description: The Philippine bank is preparing a stablecoin settlement pilot intended to speed up and reduce the cost of overseas payments to Filipino remote workers.

articles.title: BitMEX faces proposed class-action suit for theft, insider trading as crypto exchange shuts down
articles.description: The complaint claims BitMEX designed a system to retain customer collateral and alleges an internal desk accessed private user data during server freezes.

articles.title: BTC supply in profit eyes 60%, but analysis hints recovery may ‘roll back over’
articles.description: Bitcoin supply profitability improved versus its 2026 low, but analysis warned that a fake recovery had already broken down at the start of June.

articles.title: Polymarket Account in Farage Backer's Name Took $9M in Crypto From Unknown Sources: FT
articles.description: The "GCottrell93" account bet the funds on Trump's election win and cashed out the profit, though who paid in and who collected is unclear.

articles.title: South Korea’s Korbit to rebrand as Digital X under Mirae: Report

articles.title: Ripple launches Mint to expand institutional access to RLUSD
articles.description: Ripple launches Mint to expand RLUSD access for institutions as the stablecoin’s market cap approaches $1.6 billion.

articles.title: Bitcoin mining pool Poolin files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
articles.description: Bitcoin miner Poolin filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy and initiated a $52 million sale of its two West Texas mining sites as part of its future creditor recovery program.

articles.title: EU widens Belarus ownership ban to all crypto service providers
articles.description: The EU will bar Belarusian nationals and residents from owning, controlling or managing exchanges and other MiCA-regulated crypto firms from Aug. 25.

articles.title: Live updates: Bitcoin gives up gains, falls below $64,000 as stocks retreat
articles.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy — under continued pressure in this crypto bear market — released a new set of metrics to judge company performance.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs snap 7-day inflow streak with $225M in outflows
articles.description: After attracting nearly $1 billion over seven trading sessions, US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their first daily net outflow since July 13.

articles.title: Ripple’s RLUSD gets two boosts as transfer volume drops 25%
articles.description: Ripple launched an institutional minting platform and added RLUSD to Notabene’s compliance network as holder growth rose but monthly transfer volume fell to $10.95 billion.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Mirae plans to turn crypto exchange Korbit into something Korea hasn't seen before

articles.title: BitMEX hit with 623 BTC lawsuit on day it announces shutdown
articles.description: The proposed class action alleges BitMEX used privileged trading access and server freezes to profit from forced liquidations.

articles.title: Bitcoin holds near $65,000 as $800 billion AI selloff leaves crypto largely untouched

articles.title: Crypto industry to contribute $55B to US economy in 2026: NCA study

articles.title: As BitMEX exits, analysts warn crypto consolidation is accelerating

articles.description: The crypto derivatives pioneer told users to close positions and withdraw funds before it goes dark on September 23.

articles.description: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

articles.description: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.

articles.title: Alibaba's New Qwen Image 3 AI Wants to Be Useful, Not Just Pretty
articles.description: Qwen Image 3.0 generates dense newspapers and infographic grids in one shot and renders text down to 10 pixels. The catch: no benchmarks, no open weights.

articles.title: Franklin Templeton Says Agentic AI Is Crypto's 'Killer Use Case'
articles.description: The asset manager argues that AI software capable of paying for things autonomously will need blockchain rails to work—and that most investors aren't positioned for it.

articles.description: The good news: Bitcoin is holding onto key support, and rising. The bad news: a "death cross" is still active, and prediction markets are still overwhelmingly bearish.

articles.title: Clarity Act Latest Draft Bars Trump From Crypto Ventures—But Only Until 2029
articles.description: The long-awaited market-structure bill would block officials and their spouses from issuing digital assets and shield non-custodial developers, but the ethics ban expires in 2029 and enforcement rests solely with the DOJ.

articles.title: Hugging Face CEO Thanks Chinese AI for Saving the Day After OpenAI Hack
articles.description: When American commercial AI refused to help investigate the breach, Hugging Face ran Chinese model GLM 5.2 locally. Its CEO now says there's an important lesson in this.

articles.description: Prosecutors filed five forfeiture cases as Secret Service agents traced funds from thousands of victims to launderers in Southeast Asia.

articles.description: Nearly every country has yet to apply the rules, the watchdog said, warning of outright bans for platforms that don’t comply.

articles.title: Justin Sun's HTX 'Rotating' On-Chain Wallets Amid UK Sanctions: TRM Labs
articles.description: TRM Labs says the UK-sanctioned exchange has rotated hot wallets across blockchains, leaving address-list screening struggling to keep pace.

articles.description: Plus, the BTC ETFs stay green. The Clarity Act hits a wall over who enforces the ethics rules. And Jack Mallers walks away from XXI Capital.

articles.description: The free, open source workspace runs on Nostr, gives AI agents their own cryptographic identities, and challenges Slack and GitHub.

articles.title: DAT Went Wrong: Satsuma to Unwind Bitcoin Treasury, Sell Off $43 Million in BTC
articles.description: The UK Bitcoin treasury company raised $218 million less than a year ago. Now it's returning whatever is left.
